column1: # status = pass  -> lua2wasm MUST match reference Lua 5.5
# status = xfail -> captured bug; lua2wasm currently does NOT match. When it
#                   starts matching, the harness fails (XPASS) -> promote to pass.

column3: string lib: case, sub, rep, format, match, gsub-fn
%g uses fixed form below 1e-4 instead of exponent
floats print ~14 digits, lose round-trip precision
int // 0 throws nil payload, not a message
int % 0 throws nil payload, not a message
next({}) returns nothing instead of nil
arith error drops "on a <type> value" + strips .lua
(f()) not adjusted to a single value
